risk_if_not_implemented: Without Coordination with Related Plans, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Incident Response Training
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to train personnel in their incident response roles and responsibilities.
compensating_control_1.justification: Incident Response Training (IRO-05) provides personnel training and awareness that compensates for the absence of Coordination with Related Plans (IRO-06.1) by reducing human-factor risk by equipping personnel to recognize and respond to relevant threats. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Contingency Plan Testing & Exercises
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to conduct tests and/or exercises to evaluate the contingency plan's effectiveness and the organization's readiness to execute the plan.
compensating_control_2.justification: Contingency Plan Testing & Exercises (BCD-04) provides periodic assessment and assurance that compensates for the absence of Coordination with Related Plans (IRO-06.1) by providing structured evaluation of the environment to surface gaps and verify residual control effectiveness. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
